violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3 bay sink for sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Wood is used in the construction of (platform of ice machine ) in the (back storage) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
The (walls ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes at plumbing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The floors throughout the kitchen and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
